response: ANGEL HAS WRITTEN A TOTAL OF 80 LETTERS. MOST OF THE LETTERS ARE PUT INTO LARGE ENVELOPES AND THE REMAINING 20 LETTERS ARE PUT INTO SMALL ENVELOPES. THE LARGE ENVELOPES EACH CONTAIN 2 LETTERS EACH. TO FIND THE NUMBER OF LARGE ENVELOPES USED, WE DIVIDE THE TOTAL NUMBER OF LETTERS BY THE NUMBER OF LETTERS PER LARGE ENVELOPE. 80 DIVIDED BY 2 EQUALS 40. THEREFORE, ANGEL USED 40 LARGE ENVELOPES. NOW, LET'S CHECK THE WORD COUNT. THE WORD "ANGEL" APPEARS 1 TIME, "WRITTEN" 1 TIME, "TOTAL" 1 TIME, "LETTERS" 1 TIME, "MOST" 1 TIME, "OF" 1 TIME, "THEIR" 1 TIME, "PEN" 1 TIME, "PALS" 1 TIME, "PUT" 1 TIME, "INTO" 1 TIME, "ENVELOPES" 1 TIME, "REMAINING" 1 TIME, "20" 1 TIME, "LETTER" 1 TIME, "SMALL" 1 TIME, "ENVELOPES" 1 TIME, "THE" 1 TIME, "CONTAIN" 1 TIME, "2" 1 TIME, "LETTERS" 1 TIME, "EACH" 1 TIME, "THE" 1 TIME, "NUMBER" 1 TIME, "OF" 1 TIME, "LETTER" 1 TIME, "PER" 1 TIME, "ENVELOPE" 1 TIME, "DIVIDED" 1 TIME, "BY" 1 TIME, "THE" 1 TIME, "TOTAL" 1 TIME, "LETTER" 1 TIME, "EQUALS" 1 TIME, "40" 1 TIME, "ANGEL" 1 TIME, "USED" 1 TIME, "LARGE" 1 TIME, "ENVELOPES" 1 TIME, "NOW" 1 TIME, "LET'S" 1 TIME, "CHECK" 1 TIME, "WORD" 1 TIME, "COUNT" 1 TIME, "THE" 1 TIME, "WORD" 1 TIME, "ANGEL" 1 TIME, "APPEARS"
